content:
Multiple new players have reported that they cannot launch the game because of the age verification screen.

This message incorrectly appears even when the user has not entered their age yet. The only known way to resolve this is to restart until the age selection screen appears.

Please look into this, as it is turning players away from the game even before they can start.

https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1170692781216378960/1480904156570062909/IMG_0013.png?ex=69b15ef8&is=69b00d78&hm=8f6a32c21d3616bc2e8ad6efdc9a9f552b53b8f934ce5d7a4b40a88ed0ce35bf&=&format=webp&quality=lossless&width=1232&height=567
